description: Rank two or more Bayesian models by an information criterion (LOO or WAIC) from saved PyMC/ArviZ InferenceData .nc files.
rules: read-only — never mutates inputs or any remote/live service
each input is a netCDF InferenceData file written with a log_likelihood group (idata_kwargs={'log_likelihood': True})
MODELS_DIR globs *.nc (model name = filename stem); MODELS overrides with a comma list of name=path or path
requires arviz (+ pymc) importable for real output; absent libs produce a graceful {} stub
comparison table written to record_store as comparison.json
usage: Set MODELS_DIR (a dir of .nc files) or MODELS (comma list of name=path.nc). Optional IC (loo|waic). Output: comparison.json.
limitation: Read-only ranking. Models must have been fit with log_likelihood. Needs arviz/pymc + the netCDF backend; offline it writes an empty JSON stub. Reliability of LOO is checked separately by the loo_reliability perk.
